title: Raw Cuts Mmw: Dj Tennis + Dj Seinfeld B2b Demi Riquísimo
description:
🎾 RAW CUTS Miami Music Week 2026 🎾

Thursday, March 26th, RAW CUTS presents DJ Tennis at Reserve Padel Tennis.

A year in the making…This Miami Music Week, we’re  bringing DJ Tennis + (newly announced) DJ Seinfeld
b2b Demi Riquísimo to a waterfront padel tennis court for a world-class championship of music and culture. 

A micro music festival in the heart of Miami. Open air. 360° bay views. Sunset over the water. Festival energy with intentional capacity.

Set at Reserve Padel's 50,000 sq ft bayside playground: glass courts, waterfront backdrop, curated food and drink, a global crowd, all culminating in fully recorded sunset sets with two of dance music’s most enigmatic icons.

This isn’t just a pop-up. This is a Music Week experience we couldn’t be more proud of.

Joining them: RAW CUTS resident and Club Space icon Bakke + Returning favorite Mai iachetti

Miami // 3PM–10PM ET

🎾 Ticket required for entry
🎾 Entry is 21+
🎾 No phones. No VIP
🎾 The dance floor is for dancing
🎾 Culture and community first
🎾 Respect each other
🎾 Events are fully recorded
venueAddress: Miami Seaplane Base, 1000 MacArthur Causeway, Miami, FL 33132, USA

title: Tgthr Pool Parties: All Week Pass
description:
TGTHR Pool Parties at The Surfcomber hotel debuts during Miami Music Week for five days of sun-soaked energy, world-class music, and an unmatched poolside atmosphere at the iconic Surfcomber Hotel.

The TGTHR All Week Pass grants General Admission entry to all five (5) TGTHR Pool Party events, running March 25–29. 

Expect a carefully curated lineup of international and underground artists, elevated production, and a design-forward pool party experience that blends Miami’s coastal energy with TGTHR’s signature aesthetic.

This pass is perfect for those who want maximum access, flexibility, and value throughout Miami Music Week — no need to worry about daily tickets or sell-outs.

Event Details
📍 Surfcomber Hotel
1717 Collins Avenue, Miami Beach, FL 33139
📅 March 25–29, 2026
🎟️ General Admission | 21+

For individual day tickets, VIP tables, and cabanas, please visit TGTHR.events.

title: Eli Fola Presents Eli Fola + Aqutie Mmw At Arlo Wynwood
description:
Sunset, saxophone, and steady rhythms 🌆🎷🎶

Arlo After Dark returns to the rooftop for Miami Music Week as Eli Fola takes over the Arlo Wynwood rooftop for an open-air sunset session defined by his globally inspired Afro-electronic sound and unmistakable live energy.

Joining him for the evening is AQUTIE, bringing her own distinct energy to the rooftop for a special guest appearance. As well as Tech Afrique collaborators BL Suede B2B La'Dell! Together, the two artists shape the soundtrack for a night of warm grooves, melodic textures, and rhythm-driven selections from golden hour into nightfall.

Set above the city with Arlo’s signature poolside atmosphere, the evening unfolds with panoramic views, deep sounds, and a dancefloor built for those who know ;)

VIP Tables available upon reservation start at $800; please reach out to mbaum@arlohotels.com 

Arlo Wynwood Rooftop
Miami Music Week 2026
Thursday, March 26
5PM – 10PM
21+

title: Mumbo Jumbo: Rebolledo, Esquivel, Manumat
description:
Rebolledo is a Mexican DJ, producer, and experience designer known for his boundary-pushing vision in underground dance culture. Blending psychedelic beats with hypnotic basslines, he crafts genre-defying sets that weave global influences into immersive sonic journeys. A co-founder of Pachanga Boys alongside Superpitcher, and founder of Hippie Dance, he has released acclaimed solo work and influential collaborations on labels such as Kompakt. Beyond production, he has shaped Mexico’s club culture through M.N. Roy and TOPAZdeluxe, and as a key collaborator of Mayan Warrior.

Esquivel is a producer and musician who has risen as a prominent figure in the landscape of Mexican electronic music. With a distinctive approach spanning genres like indie dance, dark disco and house, Esquivel has garnered recognition in the emerging scene, establishing himself as a young promising talent. Renowned for his dynamic sets, Esquivel captivates audiences with his groovy bass lines and masterful fusion of disco, indie dance, and house sounds, ensuring you stay on the dance floor all night long.

ON THE PATIO:

MANUMAT, our dear resident DJ; Whether you discover him on the sandy beaches of Tulum, in Black Rock City’s dusty oasis, maybe nestled in the humid jungles of Costa Rica's Envision festival or in a dark bunker in the heart of Berlin, his eclectic blend of sophisticated rhythms are sure to resonate long after the party ends. With a few classic jams and new undiscovered gems along the way.

title: Aliens On Mushrooms Pool Party Miami Music Week 2026
description:
Lineup

DJ SNEAK (Chicago) 

In 1983 DJ Sneak moved from Puerto Rico to Chicago, where salsa routes collided with the cities underground House Movement Where he later shaped his legendary sound. Inspired by WBMX Radio Mix Show and the legends who played on air. He  began to hone in on his craft, working at record shops, and club culture. This is where he began his label Defiant Records and created his disco-filtered house. By the mid 90’s with multiple hit records everywhere from Classic Recordings to Relief Records. Here is where he started redefining the genre of house music, and took his sound global around the world. He has consistently stayed a mainstay as one of the top 100 DJ’s in the world. 

GETTOBLASTER (Chicago)

Born & raised in the Chicago Underground, Gettoblaster is committed to preserve the true culture of Chicago Underground House. Drawing inspiration from his early roots of playing Chicago & Detroit warehouse parties and being of of the key players of the “Rave” scene in the Midwest, Gettoblaster stays true to his vision. Selling in the top tier of the biggest platforms in dance music, Gettoblaster has chart topped in the #1 position in stores such as Beatport, Traxsource and many others. This has also gained him a large fan base that has streamed his records into the millions. Records like H O U S E featuring Missy has become House Music Anthems that never lose it reliance. Gettoblaster is here to stay as one of the top experts from Chicago. 

HARVARD BASS (Los Angeles)

Harvard Bass’ has always brought together the raw appeal of American booty with the style and function of European Ass. His sound has earned him in-crew-sion in Seth Troxler’s Tuskegee posse, Green Velvet’s Relief Records, and Tiga’s Turbo. With years of releases under his belt, he’s maintained an impressively consistent voice in Dance Music Culture. 

HATIRAS (Toronto)

Hatiras is a Toronto based house music producer, DJ who is a 2X JUNO Award Winning DJ & Producer.  Known for producing powerful filtered Disco House, he has had hundreds of top ten selling tracks through out his career. Starting his career as a promoter, since has become a multi record label owner, intentionally traveling producer DJ! Hatiras has converted with artists including Low Steppa, Junior Sanchez, Kylie Minogue, DJ Dan, Gettoblaster, Bad Boy Bill and many others. It’s easy to see how he has landed music on Defected, Toolroom, Dirtybird, and his own imprint Spacedisco!!

JESSE PEREZ (Miami)

Jesse lets the music do the talking—Big personality, even bigger bass. Rooted in Miami’s Low-End Culture, his subs blends ghetto-raw house, hip-house swagger, percolating percussion, and fitting vocals built to move crowds. His release “Fake” on Mr. Nice Guy Records is a great example of how his music hits with a rubbery Bassline, dirty drums and an unruly attitude! While dropping tunes in the past on Hotcreations, I’m a House Ganster, Edible, Defected showcase his funky, tongue-in-cheek edge. 

 
Roland Clark
 
Vampire Sex

description:

The evening features an industry mixer, a panel conversation, and live performances with drinks and light bites provided. Capacity is limited - early arrival is recommended. RSVP does not guarantee entry.

title: Ageless, Nicolas Matar, Esquivel
description:
Ageless is an Italian DJ and producer from Rome blending deep, hypnotic house and techno with a forward-thinking edge. Born from Francesco’s passion for music at 16 and officially launched in 2010, the project has evolved into one of the underground’s most compelling rising forces. A resident at Circoloco Ibiza and featured on Circo Loco Radio, AGELESS crafts emotive, late-night sounds that balance groove, tension, and atmosphere. As co-founder of the Waking Dreams label, he continues to push boundaries through standout releases, collaborations, and remixes—shaping dance floors with a style that feels both timeless and distinctly his own.

Nicolas Matar is a globally respected house music DJ whose “overnight success” was fifteen years in the making. Raised on Disco, Funk, and Soul by his father—a member of the legendary Studio 54 scene—Nicolas began DJing at 15 and developed a sound spanning Deep House, Soulful House, Nu-Jazz, Techno, and Disco. A former resident DJ at Pacha during Ibiza’s golden era (1993–2001), he has played worldwide and later returned to New York to co-found influential clubs including Cielo and Output.

ON THE PATIO: 

Esquivel is a producer and musician who has risen as a prominent figure in the landscape of Mexican electronic music. With a distinctive approach spanning genres like indie dance, dark disco and house, Esquivel has garnered recognition in the emerging scene, establishing himself as a young promising talent. Renowned for his dynamic sets, Esquivel captivates audiences with his groovy bass lines and masterful fusion of disco, indie dance, and house sounds, ensuring you stay on the dance floor all night long.

title: Babël Music Ft. Adi Oasis (Dj Set), Demi Riquísimo & More!
description:
BABËL's mission is to build a creative community that connects individuals and sparks a positive change in the world. BABËL is a global community, a collective consciousness comprised of individuals from diverse cultures and tribes who gather around music, art and the pursuit of magic. 

BABËL unites and transcends through the power of CELEBRATION and creativity. We come together as a community to connect, inspire and CREATE AS ONE.

WE HAVE A deep and passionate belief in music and art to alleviate loneliness, attract and connect people, and promote the kind of understanding that makes a diFFerence; WE celebrate our common humanity, and with imagination CREATE A NEW WORLD OF PEACE.

🎟️ AGE RESTRICTION
This event is 18+

🍾 LOUNGES / VIP AREAS / BOTTLE SERVICE

title: Inner Circle X Level Club: Mmw Beach Party
description:
Escape the masses and discover Miami’s ultimate hidden oasis this Miami Music Week.

Inner Circle returns to Joia Beach on Friday, March 27, 2026, during Miami Music Week with a beachfront sunset party from 3PM to 11pm. Set directly on the shoreline of Watson Island with panoramic views of Biscayne Bay and the city skyline, this open-air gathering moves from sunset into night and anchors itself in the high-energy "StageAndStyle" movement of Miami Music Week. A Boho-chic setting, elite sound production from Level Club, and a curated roster of Miami-driven & International talent position this activation as a standout MMW boutique event.

Sunset rhythm rituals loading...

Music By:

Emanuel Satie • Massuma • Raffa Guido

Markem • Peter Guzman

Kaala Shaw • Venthura

Amir Karim • LUU

Special Guest

This is a 21+ event beginning at 3:00 p.m. General Admission tickets provide entry only; drinks are not included.

VIP Table Service: To inquire about a VIP table or request the bottle service menu, contact us via DM at @innercirclemia or visit our official Instagram for reservation links.

Purchaser Policy: All sales are final — no refunds. This is a rain-or-shine event and will continue as planned in most weather conditions. In the case of poor weather, the start time may be delayed for safety and comfort. Lineup, pricing, and event details are subject to change. If the event is canceled, ticket holders will receive a full refund.
venueAddress: 1111 Parrot Jungle Trail, Miami, FL 33132, USA

title: Body Language
description:
BODY LANGUAGE — Miami Music Week

Dance with us this Miami Music Week at Body Language, a night of sound, movement, and connection in the heart of Wynwood. From sunset to late night, experience an immersive dance floor driven by an intentionally curated lineup of DJs delivering both vinyl and digital sounds; groovey, melodic, high-energy sets.

Headlining the night is DJ Ray with a special 2-hour set, joined by a stacked lineup featuring Maulini, Jay Moreno, Soleil Bravo, Eric V B2B Abuekev, G Segurola, Spyridon, Mystics, and Mahiko.

Expect a journey through house, melodic rhythms, and underground grooves in an intimate setting designed for true music lovers during one of the most exciting weeks in global dance music.

Event Details

📍 Location: 97 NW 25th St, Wynwood, Miami
📅 Date: Friday, March 27
⏰ Time: 5:00 PM – 3:00 AM

Come early, stay late, and let the music speak through Body Language.

Presented by Something Chill, Cadenza, and Mahiko Media.

title: Mk Presents Area 10 Pool Party
description:
MK brings his Area10 Pool Party back to Miami Music Week, taking over the iconic Surfcomber Miami Beach for a sun-soaked celebration of house music culture. Anchored by a special set from the legendary Armand Van Helden, this poolside session is all about timeless grooves, high-energy moments, and the kind of atmosphere only Miami Music Week can deliver.

FOR VIP TABLES PLEASE EMAIL US AT: VIP@TGTHR.EVENTS

title: CV Freqs Pop Patch Party
description:
We’re excited to announce that CV FREQS is bringing its very first POP PATCH PARTY to Miami at Carolina Sardi Studio! This special event will showcase eight live artists, including two featured guests: Mei from France and ALX-106 from Denver, Colorado.

CV FREQS events celebrate creativity and innovation in live music, showcasing how artists use custom modular synthesizers. Our community welcomes everyone—whether you’re an experienced musician, a curious listener, or just looking for something new. Join us for an evening of inspiring performances and discover the exciting world of modular sound.

Join us for this special event—admission is FREE and it’s BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage). Everyone is welcome!

title: Doc Martin, Dj Sneak, Matt E Love
description:
Doc Martin is a pioneering DJ/producer whose genre-blending style spans timeless dance music influences with a futuristic edge. Emerging from the 1980s San Francisco dance boom, he has spent nearly three decades shaping electronic music culture worldwide. From early West Coast residencies to global stages in Ibiza, Tokyo, London, and New York, Doc has become an enduring presence in underground house and techno. Raised in a musical family—including ties to Jefferson Starship—he developed a deep knowledge of electronic subcultures, crafting a signature sound rooted in both digital and analog artistry. Doc Martin continues to tour globally, release new music, and expand a legacy that bridges generations of dance floors.

DJ Sneak (Carlos Sosa) is a pioneering Chicago house producer and DJ whose disco-filtered grooves helped redefine 1990s dance music. Born in Puerto Rico and raised musically on salsa and Latin rhythms, he moved to Chicago in 1983, where underground warehouse parties and WBMX radio shaped his signature sound. A global touring veteran and Ibiza favorite, DJ Sneak remains a defining ambassador of Chicago house, continuing to produce, remix, and champion new talent worldwide.

ON THE PATIO:

DJ Matt E Love is a pioneer of the 1990s U.S. underground rave scene, known for deep, bass-driven house music and early residencies at iconic venues like The Limelight and The Tunnel. Founder of Bassline Records and The Bassline Lab, his releases led to international touring alongside artists such as Carl Cox and John Digweed. Now a selective but in-demand presence, he delivers refined, groove-led sets rooted in classic house. His Lion’s Den EP lands on limited-edition vinyl in February 2026.

title: Essential Deep House Brunch Miami
venue: Scotty Boy Presents: Deep House Brunch
description:
Ten years. 44+ headliners. One rule: the music comes first.
Deep House Brunch is the deep house institution that Miami Music Week heads have been whispering about since 2014. No LED walls. No influencer tables. Just a patio, a sound system, and a lineup that speaks for itself.
This year? Derrick Carter does disco.
The Chicago legend brings his crate-deep record collection to BOHO House for an open-air sunset session — think disco edits bleeding into deep house while the Miami skyline turns gold behind you.
Supporting: Jay-J (Grammy-nominated, Shifted Music), Scotty Boy, Mark Brickman, DJ Meme and Saliva Commandos.
Plus live vocal performances by Big Brooklyn Red and Nicole Graham - the thing that makes ESSENTIAL different from everything else during Music Week.
Sun. Sky. Sound. See you on the Dancefloor.
organizer: Scotty Boy Presents: Deep House Brunch

title: Human Error: Official After Party
description:
You’ve found your way into something special.

This Saturday, we’re opening the doors to a world we’ve been building for months. We are stepping away from our regular routine to celebrate the premiere of human ERROR, a short film by our own Iyo Aghedo (@from.iyo).

What makes this night unique is YOU. This is a rare opportunity to fully express yourself in a space that loves and welcomes every version of you. We are all showing up as characters in the human ERROR universe, a story about an unexpected romance that reminds us how beautiful our "imperfections" really are.

The Invitation: Come As You Are Not This isn’t about a dress code; it’s about an invitation to play. We’re all dressing up to celebrate the film’s vision, think editorial, expressive, and otherworldly. Look to the incredible models in our community for inspiration and bring your most creative self to the floor.

The Atmosphere A cinematic sanctuary. The energy is soulful, urban, and high-vibration. Our selectors Hii Rickyy and K-vass are curating a journey through the sounds we love, Hip-Hop, R&B, Reggae, and Global Beats.

Whether you’re a local regular or just touching down for the week if you like to celebrate film, fashion, and each other, this if for you!

The Details

*   Wednesday: Catch the human ERROR premiere at FilmGate Festival.
*   Saturday: The Official Celebration @ Mangrove Miami (103 NW 1st Ave).

Sounds & Hosting: Hii Rickyy, K-vass, and our host Iyo Aghedo.

Dinner: Reservations at Mangrove are open until 11PM. The Party: 11PM – 3AM

title: Claptone Presents The Masquerade Miami
description:
Claptone presents The Masquerade Miami, taking over the Surfcomber Miami Beach on Sunday, March 29th for a special Miami Music Week edition of his globally celebrated series.

Known for transforming dance floors into theatrical, otherworldly experiences, The Masquerade invites guests into a world of mystery, elegance, and deep, hypnotic house music. For this Miami installment, Claptone is joined by eight special guests and a Miami Music Week exclusive B2B set — a rare moment curated specifically for this occasion.

From sun-drenched rhythms to late-day intensity, expect an immersive atmosphere where masks blur identities and the music takes control. This is not just another Miami Music Week party — it’s The Masquerade.

FOR VIP TABLES PLEASE EMAIL US AT: VIP@TGTHR.EVENTS
venueAddress: 1717 Collins Avenue, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA

title: All Hands On Deck
description:
Heimlich Knüller is one of the few dj’s from Berlin you can call a high quality constant for years. As grandmaster of festivals, tireless treasure hunter & pearl diver, connoisseur of music, prince of track selection, sun dancer and herald of mirth his reputation precedes him.

MANUMAT, our dear resident DJ; Whether you discover him on the sandy beaches of Tulum, in Black Rock City’s dusty oasis, maybe nestled in the humid jungles of Costa Rica's Envision festival or in a dark bunker in the heart of Berlin, his eclectic blend of sophisticated rhythms are sure to resonate long after the party ends. With a few classic jams and new undiscovered gems along the way.

Born in Milan and now based between Miami and New York, Nico Bernardini delivers a fresh fusion of tech house and timeless disco grooves to dance floors worldwide. Sharing decks with icons such as Marco Carola, BLOND:ISH, LP Giobbi, The Martinez Brothers, and RÜFÜS DU SOL, Nicola brings magnetic energy to every set. He is also the founder of Harmonic Heaven, an electrifying party series launched in Miami and expanding worldwide.

ON THE PATIO:

Siegel’s audiences would describe his style as constantly blurring the lines between multiple genres. From Psychedelic Indie, Hypnotic, Minimal & Raw Techno, UK Break, and even proper old school House, there isn’t a style he hasn’t engaged in. He always finds a unique way to combine multiple sounds that seamlessly flow together throughout his sets. With a handful of unreleased originals & remixes, he is keen on pushing his musical boundaries and taking his audiences on a unique and memorable experience.

Eveava is a Medellín-born, Berlin-based DJ and producer known for her adventurous, genre-fluid sets that bridge past and future. Blending everything from 1930s boleros and rare Bowie acapellas to Aphex Twin and amapiano, her sound is an open dialogue between the organic and the electronic, the groovy and the unexpected.

Sebastian Mendoza is a Miami-based DJ and producer blending ’90s house, trance, progressive, and Latin-driven grooves into a dynamic underground sound. From his early beginnings in Panama to sharing stages internationally, he continues to champion vinyl culture and forward-thinking dance music through his project Wax n’ Dance.

title: Lunasol Pres. Sunrise
description:
Sunday, March 29th, as the sun begins to rise, Lunasol invites you to close out Miami Music Week in the heart of Wynwood with an exclusive After Hours experience.

When the night ends, we begin. Step into an atmosphere where deep rhythms, immersive lighting, and raw underground energy carry you into the morning. This is where the real ones stay.

For this special MMW Closing edition, expect a powerful sunrise journey led by a very special guest, delivering an extended set designed to move body and mind. Hypnotic grooves, elevated vibrations, and the unmistakable energy that defines every LunaSol moment.

VERY SPECIAL GUEST

———————————————————————————

LUNASOL AFTER HOURS | MMW CLOSING
SUNDAY, MARCH 29TH, 2026
5AM – LATE
158 NW 24th Street, Miami, FL 33127

———————————————————————————

For table reservations:
reservations@lunasol-miami.com

———————————————————————————

Good vibes only | Premium sound system | Immersive lighting | 21+ | Limited capacity

———————————————————————————

TICKETS & VIP TABLE SALES ARE NON-REFUNDABLE. ALL SALES ARE FINAL.

———————————————————————————

DRESS CODE
Dress to impress Miami chic. We kindly ask guests to avoid shorts, caps, flip-flops, sportswear, or beachwear. Entry is at the discretion of the door host.

This event is rain or shine.
Photos and videos will be taken for LunaSol’s media platforms. By attending, you consent to the use of your image and likeness.

✨ Welcome to Lunasol where the night never really ends. 🌅

title: Hexed Miami Youth Fair Meet Up Rsvp
description:
Something wicked this way comes to the Miami Youth Fair Grounds...

This Sunday, March 29, we’re trading sunshine for shadows. As the sun dips, Binx, DaExpose & the "Hexed Miami" crew takes over. Imagine vintage horror aesthetics clashing with the neon roar of the fair.

We’re summoning all Alts, Goths, and Misfits to congregate at the Devil Entrance at 7PM  (You’ll know it when you see it 😈), wait time 20min. 

The Vibe:

🎢 Rides under cursed lights
🕸️ Dark carnival aesthetics
⚡ High-chaos outfits (Leather, hexed accessories, DIY Goth & Punk)

Just vibes, friends, and a little bit of madness. See you at the gates, spooky freaks.

title: Zonaroza Grand Opening At The Manor
description:
SUPERNATURAL HAUS takes over 10,000+ sf megaclub THE MANOR in WILTON MANORS to deliver a three-room activation EVERY FRIDAY for ZONAROZA, featuring South Florida's top artists in the local queer + underground scenes!

7:30PM - DOORS

8PM - RUPAUL'S DRAG RACE S18 VIEWING PARTY hosted by AALIYAH JAE

Meet + greet with Kylie Sonique Love, Morphine Love Dion + Mirage at 10PM

*************
10PM - RAVE CAVE opens with HYPERPERREO

*************
11PM - EPIC BALLROOM OPENS

Late  night kicks off with a stage show starring KYLIE SONIQUE LOVE, MORPHINE LOVE DION + MIRAGE, together with a cast of South Florida's favorite local drag performers - hosted by AALIAH JAE

*************
EPIC BALLROOM MAIN STAGE: 12AM - LATE
On the MAIN STAGE - MICHAEL NAVARRO + guests take over with euphoric tech house x disco x dance sets + 🔥🔥🔥 stage shows ALL NIGHT, with a late night encore performance by KYLIE SONIQUE LOVE + MIRAGE!

*** 18+ POLICY ***
Tickets for 18+ guests are ONLY available online. All VIP areas in the venue are strictly 21+. No refunds, no exceptions.
venueAddress: 2345 Wilton Dr, Wilton Manors, FL 33305, USA

title: Ghostwoman (Free Entry)
description:
GHOSTWOMAN returns with Welcome to the Civilized World, a record born from collapse, futility, and instinct rather than reason. Formed by Evan Uschenko and Ille van Dessel, the project began in an abandoned Alberta farmhouse, where Uschenko recorded the self-released debut straight to cassette. Drawn together by a shared hunger to make music untouched by ego or cynicism, the duo forged a sound where rusted guitars and caustic drums collide. The new album channels psychic grunge, decayed Americana, and instinctive, first-take chemistry. Written across Canada and Belgium on dying equipment, its songs exist like fleeting photographs—raw, unrepeatable, and eerily alive. GHOSTWOMAN plays on as the world crumbles; meaning is irrelevant, momentum essential.

🎟️ AGE RESTRICTION
This event is 18+

🍾 LOUNGES / VIP AREAS / BOTTLE SERVICE
Table Reservations can be made by purchasing one of the VIP TABLES listed on buy.tablelist.com/v/zeyzey-miami-night. Please note that table availability is limited.

BOOK HERE —  https://buy.tablelist.com/e/f48a52f6165024e3?at=4ab59fed0e4bacc0

Please note: For our late-night shows, admission is 18+ unless noted otherwise on our Shotgun page. Guests under 18 must be accompanied by a legal guardian. We appreciate your understanding and can’t wait to see you at a show!

HOURS
Tacos María Miami + Show Doors open at x8:00 pm!
+ Happy Hour Drink Specials from 8:00 pm - 9:00 pm!

PERFORMANCE LINE UP
GHOSTWOMAN

💸 IMPORTANT: All ticket sales are final. All ticket prices include sales tax + platform fees

🎁 DISCOUNTS
Newsletter Subscriber Tickets: Must follow our Shotgun page, subscribe to our newsletter, and enable push notifications.

Join our ZeyZey Fan Perk Club for early access to select shows and exclusive content!
Join via Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/channel/AbZNyaIGKjR7id4h/

🚗 PARKING
Ride shares are encouraged. Limited, free public parking is available across from ZeyZey’s main entrance (61st Street and 4th Ave).

🎉 Book your next event!
📧 Email: zeyzey@grassfedculture.com
🌐 Visit zeyzeymiami.com for our monthly lineup and more information.

⚠️ Event Notice
Please be advised that photos and videos may be taken at this event for ZeyZey marketing purposes. By attending, you consent to your image and likeness being used across our platforms.

Events at ZeyZey may include flashing lights and strobe effects, which may affect photosensitive individuals.
__
ZeyZey Miami: An open-air cultural venue and community gathering space, offering a dynamic lineup of experiences—from laid-back, family-friendly afternoons to high-energy nights soundtracked by live music from around the world. Guests can enjoy a curated beverage program featuring seasonal cocktails, natural wines, and non-alcoholic highlights.

On-site dining is powered by Tacos María, the bold little sister of Los Félix, serving grass-fed, seed-oil-free tacos made with unapologetic flavor and zero shortcuts. @tacosmariamiami
